name: debug-mode-skill
description: Agent-agnostic debug-mode skill with local NDJSON log collection.

scripts.check: node --check skills/debug-mode/scripts/log-server.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/scripts/start-collector.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/scripts/summarize-log.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/assets/browser-log-helper.js && node --check skills/debug-mode/assets/node-log-helper.js && node --check tests/log-server.test.mjs && node --check tests/helper-assets.test.mjs && node --check tests/summarize-log.test.mjs
scripts.test: node tests/log-server.test.mjs && node tests/helper-assets.test.mjs && node tests/summarize-log.test.mjs
